languages.text: Странная мешанина костей, кожи и еще влажной плоти явно носит псевдорелигиозный характер. Судя по всему, когда-то святилище было разрушено, но сейчас его начали восстанавливать. Из человеческих тел.

The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is now in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.
languages.original_text: Странная мешанина костей, кожи и еще влажной плоти явно носит псевдорелигиозный характер. Судя по всему, когда-то святилище было разрушено, но сейчас его начали восстанавливать. Из человеческих тел.

traits.locale_text: The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is not in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.

The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is not in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.

The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is not in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.

languages.text: 骨、皮、まだ濡れた肉が奇妙に組み合わされたこの祭壇は、明らかに偽宗教的な意味合いを帯びている。かつては破壊されたが、現在では再建の途上にあるわけではない。人間の身体を用いて。
languages.original_text: The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is not in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.

traits.locale_text: 骨、皮、まだ濡れた肉が奇妙に組み合わされたこの祭壇は、明らかに偽宗教的な意味合いを帯びている。かつては破壊されたが、現在では再建の途上にあるわけではない。人間の身体を用いて。

languages.text: Kemik, deri ve hâlâ ıslak etten oluşan bu tuhaf karışım, belli ki sözde dinî bir anlam taşıyor. Görünüşe göre tapınak bir zamanlar yıkılmış ancak şu anda insan bedenleri kullanılarak yeniden inşa ediliyor.
languages.original_text: The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is now in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.

traits.locale_text: Kemik, deri ve hâlâ ıslak etten oluşan bu tuhaf karışım, belli ki sözde dinî bir anlam taşıyor. Görünüşe göre tapınak bir zamanlar yıkılmış ancak şu anda insan bedenleri kullanılarak yeniden inşa ediliyor.

languages.text: Salta a la vista que la peculiar mezcolanza de huesos, piel y carne todavía húmeda tiene algún significado pseudorreligioso. Parece que el altar fue destruido una vez, pero alguien lo está reconstruyendo. Con restos humanos.
languages.original_text: The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is now in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.

traits.locale_text: Salta a la vista que la peculiar mezcolanza de huesos, piel y carne todavía húmeda tiene algún significado pseudorreligioso. Parece que el altar fue destruido una vez, pero alguien lo está reconstruyendo. Con restos humanos.

languages.text: 骨骼、皮肤与仍显湿润的皮肉混杂而成的怪异造物，显然具有某种伪宗教意义。这座神殿似乎曾被摧毁，如今正在重建之中——而材料，正是人类的血肉。
languages.original_text: The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is now in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.

traits.locale_text: 骨骼、皮肤与仍显湿润的皮肉混杂而成的怪异造物，显然具有某种伪宗教意义。这座神殿似乎曾被摧毁，如今正在重建之中——而材料，正是人类的血肉。

languages.text: L'étrange assemblage d'os, de peau et de chair encore suintante revêt manifestement quelque signification pseudo-religieuse. Apparemment, l'autel détruit autrefois est en passe d'être reconstruit. Avec des ossements humains.
languages.original_text: The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is now in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.

traits.locale_text: L'étrange assemblage d'os, de peau et de chair encore suintante revêt manifestement quelque signification pseudo-religieuse. Apparemment, l'autel détruit autrefois est en passe d'être reconstruit. Avec des ossements humains.

languages.text: Das seltsame Potpourri aus Knochen, Haut und noch feuchtem Fleisch scheint eine pseudo-religiöse Bedeutung zu haben. Offenbar wurde der Schrein einst zerstört, dann aber wiederaufgebaut. Mit menschlichen Körpern.
languages.original_text: The strange medley of bones, skin, and still wet flesh clearly carries some pseudo-religious significance. It seems the shrine was once destroyed but is now in the process of being rebuilt. Using human bodies.
